/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native CMakeFiles/alaris_integration_test.dir/integration/end_to_end_test.cpp.o -o alaris_integration_test  ../src/quantlib/libalaris_strategy.a ../src/quantlib/libalaris_volatility.a ../src/quantlib/libalaris_pricing.a ../src/quantlib/libalaris_core.a -lQuantLib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
